answers: Start embroidery: you need fabric, hoop, needle, and embroidery floss. Learn 5 basic stitches to make beautiful designs.
Basic stitches: running stitch, back stitch, satin stitch, French knot, chain stitch. These cover most beginner patterns.
Embroidery tips: use a hoop for tension, work with 2-3 strands of floss, start with printed patterns, and don't rush.
Nakshi katha: Bangladesh er traditional embroidery art. Ekta hoop, shui, dhaga, ar kapor diye shuru koro. Khub relaxing hobby.
